conflicts_routed.message: PR #47 re-adds a stale coverage exclusion for feature:F0038 that the mainline removed at F0038 closeout; merged doc would carry F0038 in both coverage.excluded_features and features. Resolution: drop the exclusion on the contributor branch (or fixup), then re-run.
conflicts_routed.also_note: PM data fix identified during replay: mainline F0038 features record has status architecture-complete with an archived path — fix before the live train.
